headline: Assessing Insulet (PODD) Valuation After New Omnipod Clinical Data And System Updates
summary: Insulet (PODD) has been back in focus after new clinical data on its investigational Omnipod 6 and fully closed loop system, alongside fresh real world updates for its currently marketed Omnipod 5 platform. See our latest analysis for Insulet. Despite the fresh clinical and product updates, Insulet’s short term share price performance has been mixed. The 7 day share price return of 5.17% contrasts with a year to date share price decline of 46.73% and a 1 year total shareholder return decline...
